name: Horizontal Lifeline Kit
shortDescription: Cable lifeline system for continuous fall protection along a work run.
longDescription: A horizontal lifeline lets multiple workers clip on and move freely along a fixed cable run — used along roof edges, gantries and elevated walkways where individual anchor points aren't practical. Kit includes tensioning hardware, intermediate brackets and end anchors sized to the run length.

images.alt: Horizontal Lifeline Kit supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Max span
specs.value: Up to 18 m between end anchors
